Despite its overall low differentiation, the focus on utilizing sophisticated AI-driven insights for risk management sets RiskProfiler apart in a rapidly evolving cybersecurity landscape, potentially providing an IP-based moat.

The cybersecurity market is bolstered by secular tailwinds, including stringent cybersecurity mandates and an ever-increasing threat landscape, especially in the financial sector. RiskProfiler fits NCP's investment thesis for lower middle-market, services-oriented companies as it is a founder-owned business with potential succession opportunities due to demographic factors. Further detailed due diligence will be crucial to ascertain specific operational and financial metrics.
